overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character with a large cargo backpack traversing a rocky river landscape. The character walks along the reddish rocky shore, wades through the shallow turquoise river, and continues onto the opposite bank as the sky transitions to a dramatic reddish-orange storm hue.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank with snow-capped mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky shoreline beside the river, carrying an oversized cargo backpack

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rock formation lining the riverbank
tall mountain range with visible snow on peaks in the background
clear turquoise flowing water with visible current
sparse green trees growing on the rocky hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky riverbank with large red rock formations on the left and a flowing turquoise river on the right. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distant background under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with visible current

events.description: sky transitions from normal daylight to reddish-orange stormy hue

agents.ego_description: wading through the river current toward the opposite bank, water reaching knee to waist level

entered.detail: reddish rocks visible beneath the clear water surface
rocky shoreline on the opposite side of the river with palm trees

segments.scene_description: The character enters the river and wades through the flowing water surrounded by submerged rocks. The sky begins to shift to a dramatic reddish-orange color as the character approaches the opposite shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky terrain with palm trees under stormy red sky

events.description: exits the river onto the opposite rocky bank

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky path away from the river under the reddish stormy sky, heading toward higher ground

entered.detail: group of palm trees scattered on the rocky hillside
reddish-orange storm clouds filling the sky creating dramatic lighting

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the river, the character walks across rocky terrain on the opposite bank. The sky is now filled with reddish storm clouds, and palm trees dot the landscape as the character continues along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a rocky river landscape under a sky that transforms from a bright day into a dramatic storm. It begins with the character walking along a riverbank flanked by large red rock formations and a flowing turquoise river, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance. As the character enters the water, the camera follows them wading through the current and submerged rocks while the sky begins to shift toward a deep reddish-orange hue. The scene then opens onto the opposite bank, where the character continues across rocky terrain under a sky now filled with reddish storm clouds. Finally, the path leads through a landscape dotted with palm trees as the atmospheric light deepens.
